name: Expert Knowledge Packaging
description: Transforming expertise into structured licensable assets
example_success_metric: 80% reduction in client onboarding time; 3+ licensing deals closed
implications: Creates repeatable revenue streams; converts tacit knowledge to explicit IP

name: Family Knowledge Preservation
description: Capturing personal history and generational knowledge
example_success_metric: 100% of family stories preserved for 3+ generations
implications: Emotional + legal defensibility; reduces loss of intangible heritage
edge_case_handling: Disputed family ownership requires multi-party consent workflow

name: System Documentation
description: Encoding repeatable workflows and operational systems
example_success_metric: Zero-knowledge handoff between operators; 70%+ reduction in operational risk
edge_case_handling: Version drift between documented and actual process triggers audit alert

name: Training Delivery
description: Using structured assets for teaching and onboarding
implications: Scalable education without constant live instructors
edge_case_handling: Cultural or regulatory differences in training contexts require localization layer

name: Intellectual Property Structuring
description: Formalizing proprietary methods for controlled licensing
example_success_metric: 3+ licensing deals closed within 12 months; trade secret protection maintained
implications: Protects competitive advantage while enabling controlled monetization
edge_case_handling: Overly broad licensing triggers dilution risk review

name: Audit and Compliance Record
description: Immutable record for verification and traceability
example_success_metric: Passed regulatory audit with zero findings
implications: Meets SOC-2 / ISO-27001 style requirements; provides defensibility
edge_case_handling: Long-term storage media degradation requires periodic re-anchoring
